title: Modernized Retro Resource Pack
description: A required resource pack for the 'Modernized Retro' modpack. Published standalone just incase of any errors.
body:
# **[Modernized Retro Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/modernized-retro)** 
A standalone release of the resource pack used in the Modernized Retro Modpack in case any bugs appear. It is not recommended to use this without playing the modpack, as it retextures specific modded sprites used in the modpack.

Please give the [modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/modernized-retro) a try, the resource pack is already imbedded in it so no need to download! Press the link above.

Big thank you to [Herr_Chaos](https://modrinth.com/user/Herr_Chaos) for the initial help with creating this :]

![Everybody's here!](https://i.gyazo.com/53c4e3445f0343cd653f6ee4784f3f0b.jpg)

_**DISCLAIMER: Please do not take any of the textures in this pack and use it in your own. You may use this in your modpacks, but please don't change things unless you've specifically contacted me for permission. Thank you.**_
